name: Braided Water Hyacinth Tapered Floor Basket with Coiled Rope Handles - Gray - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep their space clutter-free with the help of this Braided Water Hyacinth Tapered Floor Basket with Coiled Rope Handles from Cloud Island™. Made from water hyacinth material for a charming natural look and texture, this braided tapered decorative basket offers ample space for their bath items, toys and more. Plus, the raised side handles make it easy to carry from one room to another. Simply add other braided storage bins to create a coordinated look while giving their room extra storage space.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
